name: Pesto Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine basil, garlic, pine nuts, 1/3 of the Parmesan cheese, and half the salt in a food processor. Process to chop fine.
2. With the machine running, add oil in a thin, steady stream until thickened. Set aside.
3. Melt butter for souffle dishes, sprinkle with Parmesan cheese on each dish, and set aside.
4. Heat 3/4 cup butter in a skillet over medium heat. Whisk in flour to make a pale-blonde roux, stirring until smooth.
5. Gradually whisk in milk, heating and stirring until thickened. Season with half the remaining salt, white pepper, and nutmeg.
6. Add egg yolks one tablespoon at a time until well blended.
7. Sauté scallions in remaining butter until softened.
8. Stir tomatoes into the mixture until liquid nearly evaporates.
9. Combine tomato mixture with pesto and cheese mixture.
10. Whisk egg whites and remaining salt until stiff peaks form.
11. Gently fold 1/4 of the whites into the cheese mixture, then fold in the remaining whites.
12. Pour souffle batter into prepared dishes.
13. Place in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C). Bake for 30-35 minutes.
14. Serve immediately.
